source_jobs.title: Head of Growth & Partnerships
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION

"Leading healthcare into the agentic era."

Taxo builds AI agents that automate the front desk of specialty clinics — handling patient intake, scheduling, insurance, prescription refills, and triage with human-level nuance. We’ve already secured major agreements with healthcare conglomerates across the US, UK, and KSA. The product works. The demand is real. Now we need someone to own the entire revenue engine.

This is not a “carry a quota and wait for marketing to send you leads” role. You’ll be the first dedicated growth hire at Taxo. That means you build the playbook, you run the playbook, and you rewrite it when the market tells you to. Full ownership. No ceiling.




THE OPPORTUNITY: BUILD THE REVENUE FUNCTION FROM ZERO

Healthcare is one of the largest addressable markets in AI, and the front desk is where all the pain lives. Every specialty clinic in the country is drowning in call volume, hold times, and staffing shortages. They know they need a solution — most just haven’t found the right one yet.

You’ll be selling into a market with genuine urgency. The conversations are warm. The problem is obvious. Your job is to find the right people, tell the right story, and close.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Own the Full Sales Cycle: Source, qualify, demo, negotiate, and close. From cold outreach to signed contract, this is your pipeline end-to-end. No BDR team to hand off to — you are the team.

• Build the Go-to-Market Playbook: Define ICP, build target lists, develop outbound sequences, create sales collateral, and establish the repeatable motions that will eventually scale into a sales org.

• Run Discovery & Demos: Get on calls with clinic administrators, practice managers, and healthcare executives. Understand their workflows deeply enough to sell a technical product with authority and empathy.

• Negotiate & Close Enterprise Deals: Structure contracts, navigate procurement, handle security/compliance reviews, and close multi-location agreements with healthcare groups and DSOs.

• Manage Strategic Partnerships: Identify and develop partnerships with EHR vendors, healthcare IT consultancies, RCM companies, and industry groups that can accelerate distribution.

• Own Revenue Forecasting & CRM: Build and maintain the pipeline in a CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce), deliver accurate forecasts, and report on key metrics — pipeline velocity, conversion rates, ACV, CAC, LTV.

• Drive Expansion & Retention: Post-close, own the relationship through onboarding and early adoption. Identify upsell opportunities across locations, specialties, and product surfaces.

• Be the Voice of the Market: Feed product and engineering with real buyer objections, feature requests, competitive intel, and market trends. You’re not just selling — you’re shaping what we build.

• Build the Sales Brand: Represent Taxo at industry conferences, webinars, and events. Create thought leadership content that positions Taxo as the category leader in healthcare front-desk AI.




WHO YOU ARE

• The Hunter: 5+ years in B2B SaaS sales, with at least 2 years selling into healthcare (providers, health systems, or health tech). You know how to find deals, not just work inbound.

• The Closer: Proven track record of hitting or exceeding quota, with experience closing $50k–$200k+ ACV deals. You’ve navigated complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles and you know how to get a contract across the line.

• The Builder: You’ve been early at a startup before — or you’ve desperately wanted to be. You don’t need a sales enablement team, a marketing funnel, or a playbook handed to you. You create those things.

• The Storyteller: You can translate a technical AI product into a compelling narrative for a non-technical buyer. You sell outcomes, not features.

• The Operator: You’re disciplined about CRM hygiene, pipeline management, and forecasting. You understand unit economics and can have an intelligent conversation about CAC, LTV, and payback periods.

• Bonus: Existing relati

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer (Healthcare Intelligence)
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION

"Leading healthcare into the agentic era."

A specialty clinic doesn’t just run on phone calls. Every day, thousands of faxes, patient portal messages, insurance emails, prior authorizations, and billing codes flow through the front desk. Most of it is processed manually. Slowly. With errors. And patients pay the price.

Taxo is building the intelligence layer that connects to every system a clinic touches — EHRs, practice management systems, billing platforms, fax servers, patient portals — and turns that chaos into structured, automated workflows. If the Voice AI Platform is the mouth of Taxo, Healthcare Intelligence is the brain.




THE OPPORTUNITY: OWN THE DATA LAYER

We’ve secured major agreements with conglomerate healthcare groups across the US, UK, and KSA. The complexity is enormous — and that’s exactly why this role exists.

As our Founding Engineer for Healthcare Intelligence, you’ll build the integrations, data pipelines, and AI-powered processing systems that make Taxo work across every clinic, every system, and every country we operate in. You won’t just be connecting APIs — you’ll be designing the data architecture that the entire platform depends on.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Build the Integration Engine: Architect and ship deep, bidirectional integrations with major EHR/PMS platforms (Epic, Cerner, Athenahealth, eClinicalWorks, and more). Build for the reality that every clinic configures these systems differently.

• Process the Unstructured: Build AI-powered pipelines that ingest, classify, and act on faxes, patient portal messages, insurance emails, referral documents, and other non-voice communications that flood the front desk daily.

• Master the Billing Layer: Parse, validate, and automate workflows around CPT codes, ICD-10, prior authorizations, insurance verification, and claims — turning manual billing operations into intelligent, automated processes.

• Design the Data Architecture: Own the core data models, storage layer, and event-driven systems that connect Taxo’s voice agents to the healthcare systems they need to operate. Every scheduling action, every refill, every triage decision flows through your infrastructure.

• Ship Across Standards: Work with HL7, FHIR, X12, CCD/CCDA, and other healthcare data standards to ensure interoperability across the fragmented ecosystem of clinical software.

• Build for Compliance: Design systems that are HIPAA-compliant by default — encryption at rest and in transit, audit logging, access controls, and the operational rigor that healthcare demands.

• Scale Globally: Adapt integration patterns for US, UK, and KSA healthcare systems, each with its own regulatory and technical requirements.




THE STACK

We move fast with a modern, scalable toolkit:

• Backend: Node.js (TypeScript), Python for data/ML pipelines

• Data & Infrastructure: Postgres, Redis, AWS, Terraform

• Integration: HL7/FHIR, X12, REST/SOAP APIs, secure fax protocols

• Intelligence: Leading-edge LLMs for document parsing, classification, and entity extraction




WHO YOU ARE

• The Veteran: 5+ years of experience building production software, with a track record of impact at a top-tier tech company or high-growth startup. You’ve shipped complex systems under pressure and you know how to make hard trade-offs.

• The Systems Thinker: You understand that healthcare data is messy, inconsistent, and high-stakes. You’ve built integrations with enterprise systems before and you know the difference between a demo and production-grade interoperability.

• The Data Engineer: You think in pipelines, schemas, and event-driven architectures. You can design a system that ingests a fax image, extracts structured data via AI, validates it against a billing code set, and writes it back to an EHR — reliably, at scale.

• The Owner: You don’t wait for specs. You understand the problem, talk to the users, and build the right thing. You’re opinionated about data quality and system reliability.

• Bonus

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer (Voice AI Platform)
source_jobs.description:
THE MISSION

"Leading healthcare into the agentic era."

Every day, millions of patients sit on hold just to schedule an appointment, ask a billing question, or get a prescription refill. The front desk of a specialty clinic is a high-stakes environment where every missed call or delayed refill impacts patient care. It’s broken. We’re fixing it.

Taxo builds the definitive Voice AI agent for specialty healthcare — handling patient intake, complex scheduling, prescription refills, and triage with human-level nuance. Our agents integrate deeply with EHR/PMS systems and are tailored to each provider’s unique clinical workflows, so patients get fast, accurate answers instead of hold music.




THE OPPORTUNITY: FROM 0 TO GLOBAL SCALE

We aren’t just “testing the waters.” We’ve secured major agreements with conglomerate healthcare groups across the US, UK, and KSA. The demand is massive, the contracts are signed, and we need to build — fast.

As our Founding Engineer, you won’t just be writing code — you’ll be architecting the backbone of a global healthcare platform. You’ll have a massive stake in the product direction, the culture, and the technical legacy of Taxo.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Ship 0 → 1: Transform complex healthcare workflows into seamless, automated voice experiences. Design, build, and scale the core voice AI platform from real-time speech processing to intelligent call routing.

• Architect for Scale: Build systems capable of serving hundreds of thousands of patients across three continents. Own the infrastructure that makes sub-second response times possible at global volume.

• Product Engineering: Act as a true partner in product discovery — knowing when to build for perfection and when to ship for speed. Collaborate directly with the founder and healthcare professionals to translate complex clinical SOPs into intelligent agent behaviors.

• Integrate Deep: Develop and fine-tune integrations with EHR/PMS systems, ensuring seamless data flow between our voice agents and provider systems.

• Set the Standard: Establish engineering best practices, from CI/CD pipelines to AI integration patterns. Build for HIPAA, SOC 2, and the operational rigor that healthcare demands.

• Shape the Company: Influence engineering culture, hiring, and technical standards as the team grows around you.




THE STACK

We move fast with a modern, scalable toolkit:

• Frontend: React, Next.js

• Backend: Node.js (TypeScript)

• Data & Infrastructure: Postgres, Redis, AWS, Terraform

• Intelligence: Leading-edge LLMs and Voice AI integration




WHO YOU ARE

• The Veteran: 5+ years of experience building production software, with a demonstrated track record of impact at a top-tier tech company or high-growth startup. You’ve lived through the chaos and you thrive in it.

• The Architect: You’ve built at scale before. You understand the nuances of serving large enterprise clients and high-volume end-user bases. You can design, build, and scale production-grade distributed systems.

• The AI Enthusiast: You stay current with AI/ML developments and are excited to implement them in practical, high-impact ways. Experience with voice, NLP, conversational AI, or real-time audio/speech systems is a major plus.

• The Owner: You are opinionated about code quality and user experience. You don’t need a roadmap — you help draw it. Comfortable with rapid iteration, experimentation, and learning from failure.

• Bonus: Experience with telephony systems (SIP/VoIP), healthcare data standards (HL7/FHIR), or HIPAA-compliant infrastructure.




WHY TAXO

We are solving a trillion-dollar problem in one of the world’s most essential industries. With global enterprise backing and a clear path to expansion, this is a rare chance to join as a founding member with “day one” impact and “year five” stability.

• 💰 Founding-Level Equity — 0.5–2%. You’re not joining a team, you’re building a company. Your stake reflects that.

• 🧠 Frontier AI Work — Voice agents, real-ti

notes: Healthcare AI startup with strong engineering focus
